title: Datasets showing alignments of CYTB and COI primers with Hemiptera sequences
author: Fontanesi, Luca
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Supplementary datasets of the manuscript "Honey environmental DNA reveals entomological fingerprints through dual mitochondrial cytochrome c oxidase subunit 1 (COI) and cytochrome b (CYTB) metabarcoding": 
 Dataset 1.  Alignments of the CYTB forward primer sequence with Hemiptera sequences Dataset 2.  Alignments of the CYTB reverse primer sequence with Hemiptera sequences Dataset 3.  Alignments of the COI forward primer sequence with Hemiptera sequences Dataset 4.  Alignments of the COI reverse primer sequence with Hemiptera sequences
steps_raw:
